# adhamfathalla.com — full details

## What this is
adhamfathalla.com is a premium, brandable top-level .com domain name offered for sale by its current owner. It is clean, short, and memorable, making it suitable for a personal brand, portfolio, professional presence, or business.

## Status
- The domain is **available for purchase now**.
- **Price is negotiable** — interested buyers are asked to make an offer.
- Availability: In stock (single owner transfer).
- Area served: Worldwide.
- **Secure transfer** available via Escrow.com for buyer protection.

## Why this domain
- Short, brandable, and easy to remember.
- Premium top-level **.com** extension — the most recognized and trusted TLD.
- Fast, secure transfer after purchase.

## Frequently asked questions
- **Is this domain actually for sale?** — Yes. adhamfathalla.com is actively listed for sale by its owner, and serious offers are welcome.
- **How much does it cost?** — The price is negotiable and depends on the offer. Reach out via WhatsApp, email, or phone to discuss and make an offer.
- **How do I buy it?** — Contact the owner through WhatsApp, email, or phone to agree on a price. Once settled, the domain is transferred to you securely.
- **How does the transfer work?** — The transfer can be handled securely through Escrow.com for buyer protection, or as a direct push to your registrar. Either way it's fast and secure, usually within a day.
- **Can I reserve it with a deposit?** — Yes, from Egypt, via an InstaPay booking deposit credited toward the final price.

## How to buy — contact the seller
Serious offers are welcome. Reach out through any of:

- **WhatsApp**: [+20 11 51034858](https://wa.me/201151034858?text=Hi%2C%20I'm%20interested%20in%20buying%20adhamfathalla.com) — preferred for fastest response.
- **Email**: [me@adhamfathalla.com](mailto:me@adhamfathalla.com)
- **Phone**: [+20 11 51034858](tel:+201151034858)

### Reserve with a deposit (Egypt only)
Visitors located in Egypt may optionally reserve the domain by sending a booking deposit via **InstaPay**:
- Pay link: https://ipn.eg/S/bnsaed/instapay/0egIqK
- The deposit amount is credited toward the final purchase price.
- A QR code is also available on the listing page for scanning with any Egyptian banking app.
